creator: nik@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Aug 24, 1999 at 01:00:37PM -0000, nbm@rucus.ru.ac.za wrote:
> >Description:
> 
> change external references to internal links, which seems to make things
> build without warnings, and generates useful html.

Excellent.  That was about the third item on my ToDo list.  Cheers, I'll
be committing this (unless someone beats me to it) very shortly.

N
-- 
 [intentional self-reference] can be easily accommodated using a blessed,
 non-self-referential dummy head-node whose own object destructor severs
 the links.
    -- Tom Christiansen in <375143b5@cs.colorado.edu>
